{{Quote|This is the mission the Republic Commandos were bred for: quick, covert, and dangerous.|Statement made before the mission started|<ref name="SWRC">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to Kashyyyk''' was a rescue operation carried out by the [[Clone commando/Legends|commandos]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] elite [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] which led directly to the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]].<ref name="SWRC" /> It was executed through several operations, the first of which, called Operation Furball, was to rescue the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chief/Legends|chieftain]] [[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]]. This was followed by Operation Intervene, whose objective was to destroy [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] supplies and bases. After this, Delta Squad's objective in Operation Forest Fire was to destroy the [[Kachirho Bridge]] to stop the Separatist advance. However, all of these missions were almost completed in vain when a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]] started to unload waves of troops. Operation Gauntlet was Delta Squad's final operation on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], with the destruction of the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] through the commandeering of several [[Wookiee dual missile turret]]s being the objective.<ref name="RCPG">[[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Republic Commando'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref>

==The mission==
The commandos, led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]], infiltrated a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] camp in order to rescue the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chief/Legends|Chieftain]] [[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]]. The commandos successfully rescued Tarfful from several of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|bodyguard droids]], as well as obtaining intelligence about the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy's]] alliance with the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].

Delta Squad also found out the number of hostiles on Kashyyyk, which was more than the Republic High Command had thought. The squad then sabotaged the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]]' outpost on Kashyyyk, destroying two of their landing pads. When the Confederacy launched their full-scale invasion of the Wookiee tree-city of [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]], Delta Squad was the only [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] unit planetside capable of assisting in the defense. Delta Squad sabotaged a [[Kachirho Bridge|bridge connecting the two sides of Kachirho]], stopping the Confederacy's advance. The commandos also secured vital munitions and ordnance depots for the Wookiees, allowing them to sufficiently arm themselves to fight against the Confederacy.

[[File:Kashyyyk_mission.jpg|thumb|left|150px]]
Their final operation was the destruction of a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]] attempting to land more [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] onto the surface. Following the destruction of the cruiser, [[Sev/Legends|Sev]], the team's sniper specialist, was lost, presumed MIA, but orders that came directly from [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] forced Delta Squad to abandon Sev. Delta Squad was then extracted and redeployed as the Republic invasion force arrived, and the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] was joined.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' shows the date of this mission as 785 days, or roughly two years, after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]].<ref name="SWRC" /> However, [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], one of the lead writers of ''Republic Commando'', has stated that this date was a developmental oversight and that the mission was meant to take place days before the Battle of Kashyyyk depicted in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']],<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/19565786|board=Literature|thread=Republic Commando placement?|user=[[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan_Kaufman]]|date=2005-05-06|time=2:08 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20221028144242/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/republic-commando-placement.19559632/page-2}}</ref> dated to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
